Record Class AutomationTeamCoordinator.BotStatus

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.soulfiremc.server.automation.AutomationTeamCoordinator.BotStatus
Enclosing class:
AutomationTeamCoordinator
public static record AutomationTeamCoordinator.BotStatus(UUID botId, String accountName, @Nullable net.minecraft.resources.ResourceKey<net.minecraft.world.level.Level> dimension, @Nullable net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 position, AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamRole role, @Nullable AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamRole roleOverride, AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamObjective objective, String status, @Nullable String phase, int deathCount, long lastProgressMillis, int timeoutCount, int recoveryCount, @Nullable String lastRecoveryReason) extends Record

    • BotStatus

      public BotStatus(UUID botId, String accountName, @Nullable net.minecraft.resources.ResourceKey<net.minecraft.world.level.Level> dimension, @Nullable net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 position, AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamRole role, @Nullable AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamRole roleOverride, AutomationTeamCoordinator.TeamObjective objective, String status, @Nullable String phase, int deathCount, long lastProgressMillis, int timeoutCount, int recoveryCount, @Nullable String lastRecoveryReason)
      Creates an instance of a BotStatus record class.
      Parameters:
      botId - the value for the botId record component
      accountName - the value for the accountName record component
      dimension - the value for the dimension record component
      position - the value for the position record component
      role - the value for the role record component
      roleOverride - the value for the roleOverride record component
      objective - the value for the objective record component
      status - the value for the status record component
      phase - the value for the phase record component
      deathCount - the value for the deathCount record component
      lastProgressMillis - the value for the lastProgressMillis record component
      timeoutCount - the value for the timeoutCount record component
      recoveryCount - the value for the recoveryCount record component
      lastRecoveryReason - the value for the lastRecoveryReason record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
